name: acks-god-mode
description: ACKS God Mode — ACKS II campaign engine + world-state data layer. Engine modules load headless in Node; this manifest exists to run the smoke suites (no runtime dependencies).

scripts.build:catalogs: node tools/build/build_catalog.js && node tools/build/build_encounter_tables.js && node tools/build/build_troop_catalog.js
scripts.build: npm run build:catalogs && npm run build:index
